# CaseClassSerializer

###

Related Doc: [package typeutils](<package.html>)

[ ](<../../../../../../index.html#org.apache.flink.api.scala.typeutils.CaseClassSerializer> "Permalink")

####  abstract  class CaseClassSerializer[T <: Product] extends TupleSerializerBase[T] with Cloneable

Serializer for Case Classes. Creation and access is different from our Java Tuples so we have to treat them differently.

Annotations
     @Internal() @SerialVersionUID()

Linear Supertypes

Cloneable, Cloneable, TupleSerializerBase[T], TypeSerializer[T], Serializable, AnyRef, Any
